channel.title: Playbooks on Carney
channel.description: Recent content in Playbooks on Carney

item.title: Why AI, Trust, and Buying Networks Demand a New GTM Playbook
item.description: The rules of B2B buying are being rewritten. Not incrementally — structurally. Buyers have never moved through a linear tidy funnel owned by sales and marketing; they navigate a buying network made up of internal stakeholders, external influencers, independent research, and increasingly, AI agents that summarize, shortlist, and recommend on their behalf. If your go-to-market (GTM) playbook still targets a single buyer persona or relies on volume outreach, you’re invisible in the very places buyers now start their journeys.
